name: avatar-banner-upload
description: Avatar and banner upload with in-browser cropping. Server-side resize + content-hash filename to avoid duplicates. <Avatar /> component handles deterministic colour fallbacks.
postInstall: 1. The Avatar component reads `avatar` (filename) and `username` from props
2. AvatarCropModal returns a Blob — POST it to /api/avatars with multipart/form-data
3. The avatar route stores the file as <userId>-<sha256>.png under the upload dir from file-upload-storage
4. Banner upload follows the same pattern via /api/banners
